tracker_scan.name: Tracker Scan
tracker_scan.description: Setup/Builder: Scan the area for threats. Generates 20 Stamina and 1 Focus Pip.

target_lock.name: Target Lock
target_lock.description: Setup: Lock your bow onto the target. Generates 1 Focus Pip and applies [Marked].

heartseeker_snipe.name: Heartseeker Snipe
heartseeker_snipe.description: Payoff: Aim for the heart. Consumes 5 Focus Pips to deal massive Physical damage.

volley_rain.name: Volley Rain
volley_rain.description: Payoff/AOE: A rain of arrows from the sky. Consumes 3 Focus Pips to deal AOE damage.

catch_arrows.name: Catch Arrows
catch_arrows.description: Defense: Focus on parrying projectiles. Reduces missile damage by 80% for 6 ticks.

camouflage.name: Camouflage
camouflage.description: Defense: Blend into your environment. Grants [Concealed] for 3 ticks.

archers_sprint.name: Archer's Sprint
archers_sprint.description: Mobility: Burst of speed to move instantly between rooms.

pinnacle_of_arrows.name: Pinnacle of Arrows
pinnacle_of_arrows.description: Utility/Signature: For 15 ticks, all arrows ignore Armor and deal double damage.

archer_physiology.name: Archer Physiology
archer_physiology.description: Passive: Deadeye. You gain 15% increased Vision range and 10% bonus damage with bows.
